name: Your Lovely Hell (WisePOV)
description:
They all share you, they love you too much to fight over you.

This was requested by James67th. So I decided to make this. I know I said I don't do requests, and I don't. But this one seemed easy to make.

Art by Basil_Ace on HoYoLAB.

Edited by me on GIMP (Bro this took me way too long to make because I forgot how to use photoshop, which is the paid (and I guess better) version of what I used. I'm gonna need some help the next time I make an edit like this, which was by the way inspired by The_Professionall_Idiot and their edit. And even then I couldn't figure out how to save the text part, so I just took a screenshot of my shitty creation. I tried using ChatGPT to make a similar edit, but it kept remaking the whole image and screwing up the appearance of the characters instead of adding a singular edit on the original image).

Edit on 6/26/2025: Added Yi Xuan, Ju Fufu, and Ukinami Yuzuha as a bonus because I really like her already.

Edit on 9/9/2025: Added Alice Thymefield, Orphie and Magus, and Seed

Edit on 10/25/2025: Added Lucia Elowen and Yidhari Murphy. I also added a free scenario second message. I unfortunately had to remove Soukaku and Corin from the bot due to underage issues.
creator: Blitzen_BMWM4
